name: Phone Bank Phantom
text:
Flying
Whenever Phone Bank Phantom deals combat damage to a player, you may have that player draw a card. If you do, create a 1/1 green and white Voter creature token. (You called them. They picked up. Now they're involved.)
flavorText: "Hi, do you have a moment to talk about the recall?" The line went dead. But the Voter rolls did not.
